text:
Created attachment 219747
svn diff of en_US.ISO8859-1/handbook/ports/chapter.xml

I added some wording, to the ports section of the handbook, which makes users aware of the issues of using ports in conjunction with pkg. The igor tool reported only one problem. The problem is related to a contraction, but it's on a line which wasn't edited and is not part of the svn-diff. Please consider the diff and if you think the added explanation is appropriate and accurate please commit it.
